products.name: Riso Carnaroli
pros: Excellent cooking quality, retains shape and absorbs flavors
Highly rated in Altroconsumo's 2025 lab tests

products.name: Riso Basmati

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 lab tests recommend Riso Carnaroli and Riso Basmati as top rice choices, with fresh evidence from November 2025.
